# Soft23 Async10 Swarm150 Contract

## Soft 23
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.23 with quality bias floor 0.21 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Async 10
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.10 so reclaim starts earlier

## Swarm 150
swarm expert bodies default to 150 chars, total 4k, inline 30 for denser multi-agent handoffs

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/boundary/status vitest
